subsection.content: Under regulations to be prescribed by the Secretary of Defense, an authority designated by him may, design flags, insignia, badges, medals, seals, decorations, guidons, streamers, finial pieces for flagstaffs, buttons, buckles, awards, trophies, marks, emblems, rosettes, scrolls, braids, ribbons, knots, tabs, cords, and similar items for any Military Department, or other agencies and components subordinate to the Department of Defense.
Upon request, the Secretary of Defense may advise other departments and agencies of the United States on matters of heraldry.
The Secretary of Defense may prescribe regulations providing for reimbursement for services furnished under this section.

note.heading: USAR Amendments
note.p: Pub. L. 4–36, § III, added this section.
